# viettelidc_vks_scheduler (Data Source)

Data source to get detail of a VKS backup scheduler.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (Number) ID of the host.
- `id` (String) The ID of the backup scheduler.

### Optional

- `plan_type` (String) Plan type, default is 'k8s'.

### Read-Only

- `cycle` (Number)
- `finish_time` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `quantity` (Number)
- `start_time` (String)
- `status` (String)
- `unit` (String)
